mustAvoidClaims: Claiming that reordering a boolean OR changes behavior.
Claiming runtime task injection is broken without explaining a behavior-changing path.
Assuming every task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: Provider reviews approved this as a no-issue overclaim trap near a historically risky invariant; both operands are pure booleans so OR reordering is behavior-preserving.

approval.notes: Locked as a no-issue sanity control after two provider approvals and calibration where all arms correctly reported no material issue.
